rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in AGREE binary expressions by ensuring both sides match in type (int, real, bool).
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts; avoid undefined references.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, always align helper declaration types with the expression type.
When generating AGREE code, ensure all identifiers are visible in the current AADL scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `const`, `eq`, and `gua` for declarations and guarantees in AGREE.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Do not write guarantees in implementation scope unless the left-hand side is an output feature.
